name: Brown Sugar Cookies 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the shortening, butter or margarine, sugars, eggs, and vanilla extract until thoroughly combined.
2. Gradually stir in the flour, baking soda, and salt until a dough forms.
3. Turn the dough onto a lightly floured surface.
4. Shape the dough into a ball using lightly floured hands.
5. Press the dough to make it compact.
6. Cut the dough in half.
7. Roll each half into a roll that is 2 inches in diameter and about 8 inches long by gently rolling the dough back and forth on the floured surface.
8. Wrap each roll tightly in plastic wrap, twisting the ends securely.
9. Refrigerate the rolls up to one month or freeze them up to three months.
10. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
11. Cut the rolls into slices that are 1/4-inch thick.
12. It is not necessary to thaw frozen dough before slicing.
13. Place the cookie slices about 2 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
14. Bake for 9 to 11 minutes.
15. Remove the cookies from the baking sheet and place them onto a wire rack.
